title: Mighty Oak Air Freshener – Exotic Oud Fragrance - Long Lasting Hanging Car Deodoriser – Odour Eliminator Air Freshener – Auto Accessories – UK Made Car Scent Freshener - 2 Pack
features: EXOTIC OUD FRAGRANCE: A rich, luxurious scent inspired by premium sweet oud wood - warm, deep, and unmistakably sophisticated.
LONG-LASTING SCENT RELEASE: Designed for consistent fragrance performance that keeps your car fresh for weeks.
POWERFUL ODOUR ELIMINATOR: Tackles stubborn smells from smoke, food, pets, and daily use - not just a cover-up.
UK-MADE QUALITY: Produced in the United Kingdom using premium ingredients for a superior fragrance experience.
EASY HANGING DESIGN: Ideal for cars, vans, trucks, wardrobes, bedrooms, offices, or small spaces that need refreshing.
GREAT VALUE 2-PACK: Double the freshness - keep one in the car and one for home or as a spare.
PREMIUM GIFT IDEA: Perfect for drivers who love luxury scents and stylish auto accessories.
description: Mighty Oak Air Freshener – Exotic Oud Fragrance (2 Pack) Premium Long-Lasting Car Deodoriser - Odour Eliminator - UK-Made - Hanging Air Freshener Transform every drive into a luxury experience with the Mighty Oak Exotic Oud Air Freshener. Inspired by rich Middle Eastern fragrance traditions, this scent blends warm woods, deep resins, and subtle sweetness to create a premium, sophisticated aroma that elevates any vehicle interior. Formulated with high-quality fragrance oils and crafted in the UK, this long-lasting hanging freshener doesn’t just mask unwanted smells — it neutralises them, leaving your car fresh, clean, and beautifully scented for weeks. With a convenient 2-pack, you can keep a spare on hand or refresh multiple spaces with ease. Perfect for drivers who prefer bold, elegant scents and want their car to feel as luxurious as it looks.
